title: CDIF Data Description properties
description: Additional constraints for CDIF data description level. Adds cdi:physicalDataType requirement on variableMeasured items and distribution-level cdi properties for file characterization (characterSet, fileSize, fileSizeUofM).

anyOf.description: PropertyValue variables at data description level must include cdi:physicalDataType.

cdi:characterSet.description: The character set used in the distribution (e.g., UTF-8, ASCII).

cdi:fileSize.description: The size of the distribution file.

cdi:fileSizeUofM.description: Unit of measure for the file size (e.g., bytes, KB, MB, GB).
